title: bpftrace bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[0.23.5-1]
- Rebase to upstream version 0.23.5 which fixes an issue with kstack/ustack on
  s390x (RHEL-96958)

[0.23.2-1]
- Rebase to upstream version 0.23.2 (RHEL-78919)
- Rebuild for LLVM 20 (RHEL-81774)

[0.22.1-2]
- Enable riscv64
full_text:
[0.23.5-1]
- Rebase to upstream version 0.23.5 which fixes an issue with kstack/ustack on
  s390x (RHEL-96958)

[0.23.2-1]
- Rebase to upstream version 0.23.2 (RHEL-78919)
- Rebuild for LLVM 20 (RHEL-81774)

[0.22.1-2]
- Enable riscv64

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20401-0.html
